steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: 'Company name' field is marked as invalid
Verify: 'Company type' field is marked as invalid
Verify: 'Create' button is disabled before filling required fields
Set 'API active' checkbox checked state true
Set 'Portal active' checkbox checked state true
Verify: success message is displayed after company creation
